description_long: This is a small, open canoe with a pointed bow and stern, featuring a green exterior hull and wooden interior components. The canoe has three visible wooden seats or thwarts spanning its width, providing structural support and seating for occupants. The gunwales, or top edge rails, are clearly defined and run along the length of the canoe, adding rigidity and a finished look. The interior is open and unobstructed, allowing for easy entry and exit, and the hull appears to be made of a lightweight material, likely wood or a wood-composite. There are no visible carrying handles or registration markings on the exterior. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use in calm urban waterways or as a decorative element in parks or near water features.
description: A green, open canoe with wooden seats and thwarts, featuring a pointed bow and stern and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green hull, three wooden seats/thwarts, and the open interior.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, the arrangement of the seats, and the width of the canoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the green hull and wooden interior components.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the stern, the open interior, and the alignment of the seats and thwarts.
